# CONDUENCE
> Orchestrate AI agents on the fastest AI powered trading Operating System, from event to execution.

CONDUENCE is a private-beta platform for agent orchestration. Agents use your Mind Mesh as lasting intuition (not a blank prompt each run), compose tools and triggers in Agent Studio, and keep you in the loop when you want judgment before execution.

Canonical site: https://conduence.xyz
Contact: contact@conduence.xyz

## Pages
- [Home](https://conduence.xyz/): Product overview — agents that trade like you
- [Talk to the founder](https://conduence.xyz/talk-to-founder): Book a 30-minute call about orchestration, private beta, or early access
- [Product features](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Feature overview on the homepage (Mind Mesh, Retrace, Agent Studio, Explore, Connectors, Simulator)

## Product features
- [Mind Mesh](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Teach the system how you think via voice, text, or manual mesh; agents use it as intuition
- [Retrace](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Inspect every agent run — latency, lookups, evidence, open vs skipped markets, thesis and exit plan
- [Agent Studio](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Compose orchestrators with tools, triggers, and priority graphs — no code
- [Explore](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Tool docs, trigger monitoring, and research across markets, wallets, profiles, and news
- [Connectors](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Telegram/Discord and daily tools so your judgment stays in the loop
- [Simulator](https://conduence.xyz/#pillars): Paper mode against live market data before going live

## Discovery
- [robots.txt](https://conduence.xyz/robots.txt): Crawl rules for bots
- [sitemap.xml](https://conduence.xyz/sitemap.xml): Indexable URLs for search engines
- [llm.txt](https://conduence.xyz/llm.txt): Short pointer to this file

## Optional
- [Open Graph image](https://conduence.xyz/og.jpg): Social / link-preview image for CONDUENCE
